home.title: Hello! I'm Yassin
home.description: A Full Stack Developer and aspiring AI Engineer with a strong passion for integrating artificial intelligence into modern web systems. Currently expanding my expertise in AI development, I focus on building scalable, intelligent, and user-centric applications. My goal is to bridge the gap between web development and AI innovation to deliver efficient, future-ready digital solutions.

about.aboutParagraph:
🚀 Full-Stack Developer building smart web apps with MERN + AI
🧠 Learning Machine Learning with Python & real-world AI deployment
🔨 Currently working on an AI-powered Product Recommendation Engine

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of full‑stack and AI‑driven projects I've built recently.

project1.title: EMS – Employee Management System
project1.description: A complete Employee Management System (EMS) with authentication, employee CRUD, department management, roles, and permissions built using the MERN stack.

project2.title: SkillPath – Career & Learning Guidance Platform
project2.description: SkillPath helps users discover suitable academic and career paths using AI keyword matching, with an admin dashboard to manage trainings, categories, and career paths.

project3.title: MERNStore – E‑commerce Web App
project3.description: MERNStore is a full‑featured e‑commerce application with product listings, categories, user authentication, cart and checkout flow, orders, and an admin dashboard to manage products and users.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind, an opportunity, or just a question? Feel free to reach out and I’ll get back to you as soon as possible.
